recommendations.title: The Young Messiah
recommendations.overview: Tells the story of Jesus Christ at age seven as he and his family depart Egypt to return home to Nazareth. Told from his childhood perspective, it follows young Jesus as he grows into his religious identity.

recommendations.title: Jesus Christ Superstar

recommendations.title: The Passion of the Christ
recommendations.overview: A graphic portrayal of the last twelve hours of Jesus of Nazareth's life.

recommendations.title: Return of the Jedi

recommendations.title: The Empire Strikes Back
recommendations.overview: The epic saga continues as Luke Skywalker, in hopes of defeating the evil Galactic Empire, learns the ways of the Jedi from aging master Yoda. But Darth Vader is more determined than ever to capture Luke. Meanwhile, rebel leader Princess Leia, cocky

recommendations.title: Decoys
recommendations.overview: Luke and Roger are just another couple of college guys trying to lose their virginity. But when Luke sees something unusual, he begins to suspect that the girls on campus aren't exactly...human.

recommendations.title: Suzanne
recommendations.overview: The story of a family and a love affair told through the journey of a young woman called Suzanne.

recommendations.title: Cool Hand Luke

recommendations.title: The Last Temptation of Christ
recommendations.overview: Jesus, a humble Judean carpenter beginning to see that he is the son of God, is drawn into revolutionary action against the Roman occupiers by Judas -- despite his protestations that love, not violence, is the path to salvation. The burden of being t

recommendations.title: The Gospel of John
recommendations.overview: A word for word depiction of the life of Jesus Christ from the Good News Translation Bible as recorded in the Gospel of John.
